GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C- 000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the followin g information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab 189290 417782 C heck the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. 2. ADD ADDITIONAL CUSTOM CODES 138023 631981 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000- EX46 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- E46- EX46 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in E46 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. C-000-EX46 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. C- E46 -EX46 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. 3. EX46 Error Messages 3.1 C ustom Error Messages Navigate to the Messages UI then Message Master Tab S elect + and the upper right-hand side of screen. Add values below if not already added. Save.
